summary: Video. A 2018 to 2019 DHS 'SeeSay Challenge' PSA. A host holds a 'How many times is...' cue card while people pass a yellow backpack around a college-style setting, an attention game asking viewers how observant they are. It ends with a card directing to DHS.gov/TheChallenge. It is a narrated interactive informational PSA. It predates the second Trump administration.
notable_text: How many times is the yellow backpack passed? / How observant are you of your surroundings? Visit DHS.gov/TheChallenge to complete the challenge. / If you see something suspicious, say something to local authorities.
